overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk district at night. The player exits an indoor bar into a narrow wet street lined with holographic advertisements and storefronts, then walks through an open plaza area with street food vendors and elaborate overhead neon installations.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar with neon lighting and food counter

events.description: player approaches and exits the building through a doorway into the outdoor street

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit bar past tables and a food counter toward the exit

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at the bar counter eating

entered.detail: large red neon sign with Asian characters indicating the establishment is open
rotating ceiling fan with light fixture in the center of the room
simple wooden dining tables with chairs along the left wall
illuminated advertisement screen displaying 'Just Ads' with fruit imagery
lit display window showing various food items and pastries
long counter with stools where patrons are seated

segments.scene_description: The player begins inside a narrow cyberpunk bar illuminated by red neon lights. The space features wooden tables, a food display case, and a bar counter with seated patrons. A ceiling fan rotates overhead as the player walks toward the exit, passing illuminated advertisement screens on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wet alley with neon signage and holographic ads

events.description: exits the indoor bar into the outdoor cyberpunk street with wet reflective pavement
ambient lighting shifts from warm red interior to cool green and blue neon exterior

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow wet street lined with neon signs and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near a doorway smoking

entered.detail: reflective wet concrete ground mirroring the neon lights above
large cyan neon arrow pointing right mounted on building facade
glowing holographic advertisement display floating near building
doorway leading back into the bar with light spilling out

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bar into a narrow cyberpunk alley with wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights. The environment shifts from enclosed indoor space to a covered outdoor corridor lined with holographic advertisements and glowing signage. The lighting changes from warm red to cool cyan and green tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial storefront corridor with mannequin displays

events.description: player turns slightly right to follow the curving alley path

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowded narrow street past various pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking toward the player

entered.detail: window display with illuminated mannequins in various poses behind pink glass
red spherical paper lanterns hanging from overhead structures
multiple neon signs indicating adult entertainment venues with '18+' symbols

segments.scene_description: The player continues through a narrow commercial corridor lined with storefronts featuring illuminated mannequin displays in pink-lit windows. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The path curves slightly, revealing more neon signage for various clubs and establishments.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with overhead neon structure and street food vendors

events.description: space opens up into a larger plaza area with elaborate overhead neon lighting structure

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area examining street food stalls and vendor carts

notable_agents.action: food vendor working at a counter preparing meals

entered.detail: long metal counter with stools where patrons sit and eat
elaborate swirling neon tube installation in green and orange overhead
wall covered in red and white graffiti art and tags
television screen mounted on wall showing news broadcast
mobile food cart with blue neon lighting and cooking equipment
red automated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The player enters a more open plaza area featuring an elaborate swirling neon ceiling installation in green and orange. Street food vendors operate counters and carts along the left side, with red paper lanterns hanging nearby. A graffiti-covered wall features a television screen, while pedestrians browse the various stalls and vending machines scattered throughout the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the intimate, red-lit interior of a cyberpunk bar into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins inside a narrow establishment with wooden tables and a rotating ceiling fan, moving past illuminated screens toward the exit. As the player steps outside, the enclosed space opens into a narrow alley where the warm red lighting shifts to cool cyan and green tones reflecting off wet pavement. The camera then glides through a commercial corridor lined with pink-lit mannequin displays and red paper lanterns before the path curves to reveal a wider district. Finally, the scene expands into an open plaza characterized by a swirling green and orange neon ceiling installation, street food vendors, and graffiti-covered walls.
